svg.title: Kids Storytelling Agent — Final Architecture v7 with Docker in two positions
svg.text: UI layer — app.py (Streamlit) — parent dashboard only

g.text: Story text streams word by word
Gemini 2.0 Flash — picks topic if empty

svg.text: Docker sandbox 1 — external HTTP, encoding risk, response size risk

g.text: sanitizes raw text returned from Docker

svg.text: API fail → retry → pass raw through
MATCH → block → Gemini uses own knowledge

g.text: Gemini 2.0 Flash — streams tokens to Tab 1
Kokoro-82M TTS → retry once on fail
still fails → narration_failed = True in state
Kokoro reads question aloud to child
STT local — fail: re-ask child once

svg.text: Docker sandbox 2 — binary audio input, C-level crash risk, memory risk
None → text-only judgment, N/A in UI
Post-session — runs after LangGraph completes, cannot affect current session

g.text: prompt + response + tokens + latency per Gemini call · full agent timeline
LANGCHAIN_TRACING_V2=true · not for: fallbacks, trajectory, Docker events
Kokoro retries · Model Armor decisions · Docker outcomes · trajectory scores
session timing · fallback paths · not for: LLM internals
